catalog.title: Google STEP Internship
catalog.description: A student-focused software engineering internship with mentorship, coding projects, and interview preparation.

catalog.title: Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador
catalog.description: Build technical communities, host workshops, and grow Azure, AI, and developer advocacy skills.

catalog.title: AWS AI & ML Scholarship
catalog.description: Covers AI learning tracks, project work, and mentorship for students building machine learning foundations.

catalog.title: Women in STEM Grant
catalog.description: Funding and mentor matching for women pursuing computing, engineering, mathematics, or science programs.

catalog.title: Roadmap to Data Scientist
catalog.description: A step-by-step path covering Python, statistics, SQL, machine learning projects, portfolios, and interviews.

catalog.title: Frontend Developer Roadmap
catalog.description: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, accessibility, React basics, design systems, and deployment through projects.

catalog.title: AI Career Mentor Match
catalog.description: Connect with mentors who can review your roadmap, projects, resume, and internship application plan.

catalog.title: Open Source Mentor Circle
catalog.description: Small-group guidance for choosing issues, making first pull requests, and preparing for summer programs.

catalog.title: Machine Learning Starter Kit
catalog.description: Curated courses, notebooks, datasets, and project prompts for students starting machine learning.

catalog.title: Scholarship Application Checklist
catalog.description: A practical checklist for essays, transcripts, recommendation letters, deadlines, and follow-ups.

catalog.title: Build for Good Hackathon
catalog.description: A weekend challenge for students to build useful STEM tools with mentor office hours and demo reviews.

deadlines.title: Google Summer of Code
deadlines.description: Finalize your proposal, project preference, and contributor profile before the submission window closes.

deadlines.title: Microsoft Learn Program
deadlines.description: Complete the student profile, learning goals, and community activity details for the program application.

deadlines.title: GirlScript Summer of Code
deadlines.description: Prepare your open-source interests, GitHub profile, and mentor preference before applications close.

deadlines.title: AWS Scholarship Program
deadlines.description: Finish the eligibility form, learning-track selection, and short statement for cloud scholarship review.

deadlines.title: Build for Good Hackathon
deadlines.description: Register your team, choose a social-impact challenge, and reserve a mentor office-hour slot.

deadlines.title: Scholarship Essay Review
deadlines.description: Book an essay review slot and upload your draft early for personalized scholarship feedback.
